testcase.name: test_checkout

failure.message: GatewayError: 500 Internal Server Error: unexpected field 'currency'

testcase.failure: tests/test_payments.py:48: in test_checkout resp = client.post("/checkout", json={"amount": 100, "currency": "EUR"}) app/payments.py:73: in create_charge return payment_gateway.charge(amount, currency) E payment_gateway.GatewayError: 500 Internal Server Error: unexpected field 'currency'
